name: io.github.cyanheads/usgs-water-mcp-server
description: Query real-time and historical USGS water data from ~8,000 stream gages and groundwater wells.

environmentVariables.name: USGS_USER_AGENT
environmentVariables.description: Custom User-Agent string for USGS NWIS requests. Defaults to a descriptive identifier including the repo URL.

environmentVariables.name: USGS_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS
environmentVariables.description: HTTP request timeout in milliseconds for NWIS calls. Default: 30000.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Sets the minimum log level for output (e.g., 'debug', 'info', 'warn').

environmentVariables.name: USGS_USER_AGENT
environmentVariables.description: Custom User-Agent string for USGS NWIS requests. Defaults to a descriptive identifier including the repo URL.

environmentVariables.name: USGS_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS
environmentVariables.description: HTTP request timeout in milliseconds for NWIS calls. Default: 30000.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_HOST
environmentVariables.description: The hostname for the HTTP server.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_PORT
environmentVariables.description: The port to run the HTTP server on.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_ENDPOINT_PATH
environmentVariables.description: The endpoint path for the MCP server.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Sets the minimum log level for output (e.g., 'debug', 'info', 'warn').
